nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel router module that aggregates and re-exports all API routers including auth, works, notary, monitor, IPR, supply, publish, versions, batch_works, dashboard, and system.

nodes.name: batch_works.py
nodes.summary: Batch operation endpoints for bulk editing, soft-delete, trash management, and recursive folder import with auto-project creation, deduplication, thumbnail generation, and EXIF extraction.

nodes.name: notary.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive notarization API with 20 endpoints supporting C2PA manifest generation and verification, W3C DID and VC workflows, Merkle tree batch anchoring, multi-platform comparison, and audit trails.

nodes.name: versions.py
nodes.summary: Work version management and project grouping endpoints supporting version history, rollbacks, project CRUD, and work-to-project assignment.

nodes.name: websocket_router.py
nodes.summary: WebSocket endpoint for real-time notifications, supporting connection management, subscribe and ping protocols, and broadcast messaging.

nodes.name: works.py
nodes.summary: Primary work management API with 33 functions covering full CRUD, AI auto-tagging, rights declarations, tag management, batch culling, preview generation, and bulk folder import.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Barrel module aggregating all Pydantic schema exports for works, notary, monitor, IPR, supply, publish, and common response models.

nodes.name: ipr.py
nodes.summary: Intellectual property registration schemas including CRUD models, intelligent prefill, NICE class recommendation, validation, portfolio dashboard, and renewal tracking.

nodes.name: monitor.py
nodes.summary: Infringement monitoring schemas with fingerprint generation and comparison, brand watch, domain watch, DMCA templates, code similarity, delta detection, platform rotation, priority scoring, and video/audio/text fingerprint scanning.

nodes.name: notary.py
nodes.summary: Notarization schemas covering record CRUD, certificate responses, C2PA manifest and verify, DID document, verifiable credentials, Merkle tree batch proofs, platform fee comparison, and audit trails.

nodes.name: publish.py
nodes.summary: Publishing and monetization schemas including product management, platform publishing requests, and revenue tracking.

nodes.name: supply.py
nodes.summary: Supply chain schemas for partner management with ratings and categories, and order lifecycle tracking with deposit and balance management.

nodes.name: work.py
nodes.summary: Core work management schemas covering create, update, and response models for works and tags, hash-only and lowres upload, rights updates, and AI tag suggestions.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Service layer barrel module exporting hash computation, work metadata extraction, thumbnail generation, FTS5 search, WebSocket manager, evidence generation, C2PA, and auto-tagging.

nodes.name: auto_tag_service.py
nodes.summary: Rule-based auto-tagging engine using filename keywords, EXIF data, file type mapping, and time-based labels with tag suggestion autocomplete for creative industry tags.

nodes.name: c2pa_service.py
nodes.summary: Pure Python C2PA (Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity) manifest generation with ECDSA signing, JWK conversion, and satellite file embedding.

nodes.name: cache.py
nodes.summary: Thread-safe TTL cache with LRU eviction and configurable max size, providing a reusable @cached decorator for memoizing expensive API calls and database queries.

nodes.name: did_service.py
nodes.summary: W3C DID (Decentralized Identifier) service implementing did:key method with base58btc encoding and multicodec prefix mapping for ECDSA P-256/384/521 keys.

nodes.name: hasher.py
nodes.summary: File hashing service computing SHA-256 and MD5 with chunked reads for large files, supporting progress callbacks for user feedback.

nodes.name: local_notary.py
nodes.summary: ECDSA L1 local signing service using secp256r1 keys for cryptographic timestamping of file hashes with persistent JSON signature storage.

nodes.name: merkle_tree.py
nodes.summary: Bitcoin-style Merkle tree implementation with double SHA-256, proof generation and verification for batch notarization anchoring.

nodes.name: search_service.py
nodes.summary: SQLite FTS5 full-text search service setting up virtual tables with triggers on the works table, supporting cached search queries.

nodes.name: vc_service.py
nodes.summary: W3C Verifiable Credential service creating work credentials with linked data proofs, ECDSA signature verification, and canonical JSON serialization.

nodes.name: websocket_manager.py
nodes.summary: Async WebSocket connection manager supporting per-client broadcasts, task progress notifications, scan results, reminders, and certificate readiness events.

nodes.name: work_service.py
nodes.summary: Work metadata extraction service handling image dimensions, video thumbnails via ffmpeg, audio metadata via mutagen, document analysis, and EXIF parsing.

nodes.name: batch_edit_works
nodes.summary: Bulk-edits multiple works simultaneously, updating tags, project, stage, metadata, rights, and license.

nodes.name: permanent_delete
nodes.summary: Permanently deletes a trashed work and removes its associated file from disk.

nodes.name: import_folder
nodes.summary: Recursively imports a folder tree as works with deduplication by SHA-256, auto-project creation from subdirectory names, thumbnail generation, EXIF metadata, and automatic tagging.

nodes.name: confirm_notary_record
nodes.summary: Confirms a notarization record after platform callback, updating status, certificate info, and expiration dates.

nodes.name: generate_c2pa_for_work
nodes.summary: Produces a C2PA manifest with identity keypair, signs assertions with ECDSA, and embeds metadata as a satellite JSON alongside the original work file.

nodes.name: verify_c2pa_for_work
nodes.summary: Validates the C2PA manifest signature against the stored public key, checking assertion integrity.

nodes.name: generate_vc_for_work
nodes.summary: Issues a W3C Verifiable Credential for a work, linking the DID document with an ECDSA-signed proof of creation.

nodes.name: merkle_batch_anchor
nodes.summary: Builds a Merkle tree from work SHA-256 hashes, anchors the root to a blockchain via AntChain, and returns individual Merkle proofs.

nodes.name: compare_notary_platforms
nodes.summary: Scores available notarization platforms by cost, legal level, and speed to recommend the optimal platform for a given use case.

nodes.name: recommend_notary_platform
nodes.summary: Analyzes a single work and recommends the best notarization platform based on file type, urgency, and budget.

nodes.name: create_version
nodes.summary: Creates a version snapshot of a work by recording current file hash, path, size, and optional notes.

nodes.name: rollback_version
nodes.summary: Rolls back a work to a previous version by restoring its file hash to the version's recorded value.

nodes.name: create_project
nodes.summary: Creates a new project container for organizing related works.

nodes.name: delete_project
nodes.summary: Deletes a project and disassociates all linked works.

nodes.name: assign_to_project
nodes.summary: Associates a work with a project for organizational grouping.

nodes.name: create_work
nodes.summary: Creates a new creative work record with file upload, auto-thumbnail generation, EXIF metadata extraction, and automatic tag assignment.

nodes.name: list_works
nodes.summary: Paginated work listing with rich filters for file type, status, tags, camera metadata (ISO, aperture, focal length), GPS coordinates, date range, and multi-axis sorting.

nodes.name: update_work
nodes.summary: Updates mutable fields on a work record including title, description, stage, and metadata.

nodes.name: get_preview_url
nodes.summary: Generates a preview URL for a work, constructing paths from thumbnail and original file data.

nodes.name: add_tag
nodes.summary: Adds a tag to a work, creating it globally if it does not already exist.

nodes.name: rename_tag
nodes.summary: Renames a global tag across all works that use it.

nodes.name: create_hash_only_work
nodes.summary: Creates a work record without an uploaded file, using only a SHA-256 hash for identification.

nodes.name: create_lowres_work
nodes.summary: Creates a work record with a low-resolution version for preview purposes.

nodes.name: replace_work_file
nodes.summary: Replaces the file of an existing work, recomputing hash and regenerating the thumbnail while preserving all metadata.

nodes.name: fork_work
nodes.summary: Creates a derivative work copy from an existing work, assigning it a new ID while preserving metadata and linking via parent_work_id.

nodes.name: generate_rights_declaration
nodes.summary: Generates a creative rights declaration document with author information, timestamp, work details, and digital signature placeholders.

nodes.name: suggest_tags_ai
nodes.summary: Accepts file name, type, description, and EXIF data to generate intelligent tags using the rule-based auto-tagging engine.

nodes.name: import_folder
nodes.summary: Recursively imports a folder tree as works with deduplication by SHA-256, auto-project creation from subdirectory names, thumbnail generation, EXIF metadata, and automatic tagging.

nodes.name: import_project_package
nodes.summary: Imports a project package zip file, extracting work records with associated files and metadata.

nodes.name: batch_cull
nodes.summary: Batches cull operations (rating/color-label/status changes) across multiple works based on filter criteria or explicit IDs.

nodes.name: process_raw
nodes.summary: Processes RAW photo files by converting them to standard formats and updating the work record.

nodes.name: single_cull
nodes.summary: Performs a single cull operation (star rating, color label, or cull status) on a specific work.

nodes.name: auto_generate_tags
nodes.summary: Auto-generates tags from file name, type, EXIF metadata, and creation date using keyword matching against predefined category mappings.

nodes.name: suggest_tags
nodes.summary: AI-powered tag suggestion endpoint that analyzes work metadata and calls the auto-tag service for intelligent tag recommendations.

nodes.name: generate_c2pa_manifest
nodes.summary: Generates a complete C2PA-compatible manifest JSON with CreativeWork assertions, content hashes, and ECDSA signature info for content provenance.

nodes.name: generate_c2pa_with_identity
nodes.summary: Generates a complete C2PA manifest with a fresh ECDSA keypair for signing and verification.

nodes.name: verify_c2pa_manifest
nodes.summary: Verifies the C2PA manifest ECDSA signature against a public key.

nodes.name: embed_c2pa_metadata
nodes.summary: Embeds C2PA manifest as a satellite JSON file alongside the original work.

nodes.name: generate_did
nodes.summary: Derives a did:key identifier from an ECDSA public key using multicodec encoding and base58btc compression.

nodes.name: create_did_document
nodes.summary: Generates a W3C-compliant DID Document with JsonWebKey2020 verification method for a did:key.

nodes.name: resolve_did
nodes.summary: Resolves a did:key identifier back to a DID Document by decoding its embedded public key data.

nodes.name: compute_sha256
nodes.summary: Computes SHA-256 hash of a file using 64KB chunks with optional progress callback for large files.

nodes.name: sign_work
nodes.summary: Cryptographically signs a file hash with an ECDSA secp256r1 key, producing a timestamped signature for local notarization.

nodes.name: verify_work_signature
nodes.summary: Verifies an ECDSA signature against a file hash and timestamp to confirm authenticity.

nodes.name: save_signature
nodes.summary: Persists signature data as a JSON file in the signatures directory.

nodes.name: setup_fts5
nodes.summary: Initializes the FTS5 virtual table and triggers for automatic indexing on the works table.

nodes.name: search_works_fts
nodes.summary: Full-text search over works using SQLite FTS5, returning matching work IDs with caching support.

nodes.name: create_work_credential
nodes.summary: Creates a W3C Verifiable Credential for a work with linked data proof using ECDSA.

nodes.name: verify_credential
nodes.summary: Validates a verifiable credential by checking its structure, proof presence, and JWS signature.

nodes.name: create_work_credential_full
nodes.summary: Complete workflow generating a DID, DID document, and work credential in a single call.

nodes.name: detect_file_type
nodes.summary: Detects file type from extension, categorizing into image, audio, video, document, design, code, or other.

nodes.name: generate_thumbnail
nodes.summary: Generates thumbnails for various file types using Pillow for images, ffmpeg for videos, and placeholder art for audio/documents/design files.

nodes.name: extract_exif
nodes.summary: Extracts EXIF metadata from image files using Pillow and TAGS mapping.

nodes.name: get_all_metadata
nodes.summary: Unified metadata extractor delegating to type-specific handlers for image, audio, video, and document files.
